The power of a mastermind can help solve any problem by finding the best possible solutions for
any opportunity. With this tool we will highlight one person at a time and address their biggest
problems and help them come up with solution-oriented action steps.
Name: 	Date:
Full Focus Help
Dean Graziosi 	5/28/24
What’s the biggest problem holding you back from your next level?	// 01
The best strategy is to fix my copy and add an upsell!
I have so many amazing Facebook followers, but I can’t seem to find a successful
way to monetize them!
I can try hiring a Facebook ads consultant to help.
I can try adding an upsell to my offer to help with costs.
I can try writing better copy and see if that improves it.
What is the #1 thing that could fuel your next level?	// 02
Brainstorm with the group: What are your possible solutions to solving that issue?	// 03
Review the brainstorm above. What are the best strategies or ideas to immediately take action on
so you can break throught your challenge or make the most do you current opportunities?
// 04
I can´t seem to get Facebook ads to work for my new offer.
www.getwsodo.com
